entries.description: Leather or padded armor. 1d2-1 protection (0-1 soak), no penalties.
entries.name: Light Armor

entries.description: Chain, scale, breastplate. 1d3-1 protection (0-2 soak), -1 evasion. If not meeting requirement: -2 movement, -1 additional soak penalty.
entries.name: Medium Armor

entries.description: Full plate. 1d3 protection (1-3 soak), -2 evasion, -3 stealth when moving, -1 movement. If not meeting requirement: -2 additional movement, -1 additional soak penalty.
entries.name: Heavy Armor
